title: Health Canada’s mandate - Canada.ca
content:
## Health Canada’s mandate
What Health Canada does, our mission and values, the acts and regulations for which we’re responsible.
How we help Canadians maintain and improve their health.

#### Mission, vision and values
Our commitment to improving the health of Canadians.
How Health Canada regulates products and manages health risks.
Department-supported activities to improve health care, protect your health and prevent disease.
Acts and regulations that directly affect the health and safety of Canadians.
